prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild infirmary; Toma Mistfell, a feminine crafter in a rolled-sleeve apron with ash-marked gloves, kneels on the floor to wipe up a sticky spill of glowing healing potion. Toma Silverbrook, a masculine guild coordinator in a formal cloak, kneels beside her, offering a clean cloth to assist in the cleanup. Cozy workshop lighting, cinematic camera angle, high-quality anime style, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild infirmary shot; Toma Mistfell and Toma Silverbrook coordinate to lift a heavy wooden crate that was resting in the potion spill. Mistfell guides the crate's position while Silverbrook lifts, their movements synchronized and diligent. Consistent characters, cozy lighting, fluid animation, no text, no watermark.
